Reference

Metric definitions

Plain-English explanation of every metric shown in this dashboard, with its calculation rule. Search to filter.

Data sources: sessions, payroll, sales, new-member, lead and lapsed membership exports. Complete months through April 2026; May partial data is intentionally excluded.
